svg.title: Chunked prefill versus monolithic prefill on two concurrent local chat slots, with TTFT and activation memory plotted against chunk size on a 32 GB Radeon AI PRO R9700
svg.desc: Left panel: a Gantt-style wall-clock timeline showing two concurrent chat slots on a single local GPU. The top half is the monolithic case, where slot A prefills from 0 to 9 seconds in a long blue bar, then streams green decode ticks; slot B is idle until 9 seconds, then prefills from 9 to 16 seconds in another long blue bar, then decode ticks. A vertical orange dashed line at 16 seconds marks slot B's first decode token. The bottom half is the chunked case, where slot A's prefill is broken into four shorter blue chunks with slot B decode ticks interleaved between chunks; slot B's first decode token lands at 11 seconds, marked with a green dashed line. Right panel: a curve plot with chunk size on a log x axis from 64 to 4096 tokens. A blue TTFT curve descends from 240 seconds at chunk 64 to 142 seconds at chunk 2048, then rises sharply back to 200 seconds at chunk 4096 inside a red shaded OOM zone. An orange activation-memory curve rises monotonically from 0.4 to 14.4 gigabytes across the same chunk-size range, crossing a horizontal 13 GB dashed line at chunk size 3700. A real-measurement dot at chunk size 2048 references the 5800-token prompt TTFT drop on four Tesla T4 cards from llama.cpp discussion 6328. Footer references llama.cpp issue 17578 and Sarathi-Serve OSDI 2024.
svg.text: Chunk size sets first-token latency on local long-prompt Qwen3
Two concurrent chat slots on one GPU, and the TTFT vs activation Pareto on a 32 GB Radeon AI PRO R9700
Monolithic prefill: slot B waits for slot A's prefill to finish
Chunked prefill: slot A's prefill chunks interleave with slot B's decode

g.text: Cost of chunking on slot A
Slot A decode pace falls from 117 tok/s to roughly 60 tok/s during prefill window;
slot B's first token lands 5 seconds sooner because chunks fit alongside decode.

svg.text: TTFT vs activation memory on R9700 (illustrative, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B)
R9700 free pool ceiling after Qwen3.6-35B-A3B weights + 128k KV

g.text: safe across all archs, not optimal

svg.text: Sources: Sarathi-Serve, OSDI 2024 (stall-free batching framing). llama.cpp tools/server README (default --batch-size 2048, --ubatch-size 512).
llama.cpp issue 17578 (Qwen3-Next memory-pool crash at ubatch ≥ 2048 in build_delta_net_chunking). Real TTFT data point: ggml-org/llama.cpp discussion 6328.
